subject: Q3 Budget Review and Timeline Discrepancy
body: Hi, I looked over the project proposal. The budget numbers look mostly fine, but we need to confirm if the delivery timeline is mid-August or late September. Let me know your thoughts before the stakeholder meeting.

subject: [GitHub] Security Alert: dependency vulnerability found
body: We found a known vulnerability in one of your dependencies. Please review the alert and upgrade your packages immediately.

subject: Action Required: Update your verification details
body: All engineering team members must complete the quarterly compliance verification profile by Friday afternoon.
